scope: API contract drift probe — frontend↔backend, deploy-manifest, deploy-mode reachability, MCP↔backend coverage

spec.detail: Scope materialized in task_plan.md §11/§12/§13/§14 as atomic queue (S11.1.a–f, S12.1.a–f, S13.1.a–e, S14.1.a–e). Phase milestones declared per slice. Deferred-half explicit per CLAUDE.md MVS-pattern.

build.detail: Probe extended in 4 vertical slices: parse_dual_backends + parse_frontend_paths (G1), parse_deploy_manifests (G2), compute_reachability_per_deploy_mode (G3), parse_mcp_tools + compute_mcp_attribution (H). All slices land in scripts/audit_api_contract.py with no backend code change.

test.detail: tests/test_api_contract_drift.py 7/7 PASS — test_no_new_frontend_orphans, test_known_orphans_still_orphans, test_dual_backend_drift_signal_present, test_backends_both_present, test_deploy_manifests_parsable_and_nonempty, test_reachability_emits_both_deploy_modes, test_mcp_tools_have_known_route_targets

typecheck.detail: Pure Python with stdlib regex/json; no TypeScript/mypy strict surface introduced. Probe imports cleanly under .venv/bin/python3 3.13.11.

security.detail: Grep battery on scripts/audit_api_contract.py + tests/test_api_contract_drift.py: 0 hits for eval(/Function(/subprocess.*shell=True/process.env.*TOKEN|SECRET|KEY/dangerouslySetInnerHTML. Probe is read-only — opens repo files, parses regex, writes JSON to outputs/. No network egress, no shell exec, no secret access.

license_audit.detail: No new third-party deps introduced; stdlib-only.

dim_verify.detail: Non-visual deliverable — text-only audit probe. Per pdca-iteration-pipeline Gotcha #3 the SKIP is documented explicitly here.

swarm_review.detail: Non-visual deliverable — auto-visual-swarm-review not applicable. CI guards (parseability + premise + orphan_count==0 hard fail) carry the regression discipline that swarm review would otherwise carry for visual deliverables.

release.detail: Audit probe ships into nightly tier (test_api_contract_drift collected only in nightly slice). Standard tier unchanged (1582 collected). Module mismatch reported as signal, NOT enforced — preserves Maurice HITL discipline (merge / split-formalize / deprecate decision).

observe.detail: Capability ledger flips logged in doc/00_project/initiative_cognebula_sota/notes.md under 2026-04-28 entry. [BOOTSTRAP-EVOLUTION] traces emit via post-edit-sota-audit.py PostToolUse hook on each Edit of in-scope files.

learn.detail: Capability catalog delta: 4 LACKING→PRESENT flips this sprint (audit_api_contract, frontend_orphan_gate_in_ci, deploy_manifest_parsing, reachability_per_deploy_mode, mcp_vs_backend_coverage). DNA capsule candidate: 'parse-only audit probe that reports HITL-pending conditions as signals without gating CI on their resolution'.

remaining_risks.description: Audit is parse-only — a backend that compiles but fails at deploy time would not be caught (e.g. wrong module path in Dockerfile vs systemd, route registered but handler import-errors).
remaining_risks.mitigation: Sprint G4 will add OPTIONS /api/v1/.well-known/capabilities runtime endpoint + pytest fixture that resolves every frontend fetch path against a live backend instance.

remaining_risks.description: Two backends (kg-api-server:app vs src.api.kg_api:app) remain split. module_mismatch_signal=true is reported but not enforced, by design (HITL discipline).
remaining_risks.mitigation: Probe makes the divergence visible at every nightly run; surface enables informed merge/split-formalize/deprecate decision when Maurice has the operational data to choose.

remaining_risks.description: 灵阙 desktop frontend lives in a separate repo and is not parsed by this probe. Frontend orphans there would not be detected.
remaining_risks.mitigation: Separate session; copy-pattern the audit_api_contract.py probe into the lingque-desktop repo or generalize into a shared scripts/ AI-Fleet skill.

remaining_risks.description: nginx config parser is regex-narrow (proxy_pass directives only). A multi-server-block or upstream-with-load-balancer config would be parsed incompletely.
remaining_risks.mitigation: Out of MVS budget (~200 LOC for hand-rolled state machine). Use python-nginx or nginx-conf-parser library if Sprint G4+ scope demands it.

dna_capsule_candidates.description: When auditing a system in HITL-pending state (e.g. unresolved architectural decision), the audit probe must report the divergence as a signal field and emit a CI test that asserts probe-parseability and probe-premise — NOT equality of the diverged values. Forcing equality converts HITL pause into CI failure, which either pressures rushed decision or trains team to ignore CI.
dna_capsule_candidates.trigger: Adding CI tests around any system property whose resolution is awaiting human judgment.
dna_capsule_candidates.evidence: scripts/audit_api_contract.py reports module_mismatch_signal=true; tests/test_api_contract_drift.py asserts both manifests parseable + at-least-one-mode unreachable, NOT dockerfile_module==systemd_module.

dna_capsule_candidates.description: Atomic execution queue must pre-count test count delta per slice (e.g. 'S13.1.e: 5,866 → 5,867 (+1, pre-counted: 1 new test method)'). Pre-counting catches the Sprint G1-style '+1 vs +4' thinko before it lands and triggers a confusing nightly diff during regression.
dna_capsule_candidates.trigger: Any slice that adds pytest test cases.
dna_capsule_candidates.evidence: task_plan.md §12.1.f and §13.1.e both pre-count +1 test per slice; actual nightly delta 5,865 → 5,867 = +2 matches plan exactly.
